productDisplayName: Nike Men Navy Blue Track Pants
description: CompositionNavy blue track pants made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit fabric, broad elasticated waistband with drawstrings, two insert pockets on the sides, panel detailing and nike swoosh embroidered on the left legFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach, dry clean or ironTumble dry lowAdd some speed to your stride in these nike cricket track pants.
